title: The Surveillance Gap: Failure Mode Taxonomy for FDA-Cleared AI/ML Medical Devices in MAUDE — Analysis Code and Data
description: Reproducibility code and processed datasets for: The Surveillance Gap: Failure Mode Taxonomy and Post-Market Monitoring Adequacy of FDA-Cleared AI/ML Medical Devices in MAUDE. Includes data acquisition scripts (FDA device list + openFDA MAUDE API), multi-stage device-report linkage, GPT-4o-mini few-shot failure mode classification with validation, surveillance gap analysis, and publication figure generation.
